articles.author: Alex Harring, Luke Fountain
articles.title: Trump bought Apple, Nvidia and other tech giants before tariff reversal fueled rebound - CNBC
articles.description: The day before President Donald Trump walked back his tariff policy turned out to be one of his busiest days of 2025 for stock buying.
articles.content:
Traders work on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange on March 5, 2025.
While investors and businesses spent the early days of April 2025 fretting over the future of global trade and the economy,… [+4699 chars]

articles.author: Sarfraz Khan
articles.title: Intel Expected To Restart Supply Of 10th, 12th, 13th, And 14th Gen Processors In Mainland China - Wccftech
articles.description: Intel restarts supply of 10th to 14th-gen processors in China amid rising DDR5 prices, focusing on DDR4-compatible motherboard production.
articles.content:
Intel will reportedly focus more on the previous-gen processors to fulfill the current demand in the PC market. 
Roughly a month ago, we reported that some vendors are now restarting the production … [+1899 chars]
